subcodes.first_line: Through the loving-kindness of the Lord of Names thou hast attained unto the most exalted Summit, which is the presence of the Best-Beloved, and the sweet fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعنایت مالک اسما بمقام اعلی الاعلی که لقای حضرت دوست است فائز گشتی و نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @presence of; reunion with God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual transformation
